import json
with open(''/Users/azhir.ahmadi/personal/better-BAMF-LID-questions/bamf-questions.json'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
    print(f''Total questions: {len(data[""questions""])}'')
    print(f''First question: {data[""questions""][0][""number""]}'')
    print(f''Last question: {data[""questions""][-1][""number""]}'')
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open(''/Users/azhir.ahmadi/personal/better-BAMF-LID-questions/bamf-questions.json'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
    questions = data[''questions'']
    q96 = next((q for q in questions if q[''number''] == 96), None)
    if q96:
        print(f''Question {q96[""number""]}:'')
        print(''Available keys:'', list(q96.keys()))
        for key, value in q96.items():
            print(f''{key}: {value}'')
    else:
        print(''Question 96 not found'')
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open(''/Users/azhir.ahmadi/personal/better-BAMF-LID-questions/bamf-questions-en.json'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8'') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
    questions = data[''questions'']
    q96 = next((q for q in questions if q[''number''] == 96), None)
    if q96:
        print(f''Question {q96[""number""]}:'')
        print(f''English: {q96[""questionText""]}'')
        print(f''Options: {q96[""options""]}'')
        print(f''Correct Answer: {q96[""correctAnswer""]}'')
    else:
        print(''Question 96 not found'')
")
